untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Standardized Unexpected Earnings (SUE) metric, which is not available in the allowed indicators list. SUE is a fundamental/earnings-based metric derived from actual vs. consensus earnings estimates, not a technical indicator. The signal also specifies portfolio formation based on earnings surprise magnitude, which requires access to earnings announcement data and consensus forecasts—neither available in the provided technical indicator set.
translation_notes: This is a fundamental earnings-surprise-based signal requiring earnings data and analyst consensus estimates. The allowed indicator set contains only technical price/volume indicators. A proxy using recent returns (positive = momentum) was attempted but does not capture the specific SUE methodology referenced in the academic source (Stickel 1989). Proper implementation requires an earnings database and earnings surprise calculation module external to technical indicators.
